category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the compiler for the Koka language; the official repository describes Koka as a strongly typed functional-style language with effect types and handlers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is koka; the official repository title uses Koka.
docs_sources: The official koka-lang/koka repository links to the Koka book and library documentation under koka-lang.github.io/koka.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/koka-lang/koka, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a language compiler; the official repository describes functional-style programming, effect types, and handlers.
